another option is to use a lottery system where each participant pays an entry fee and then randomly draws a number out of a hat or uses a digital lottery system the person who wins the highest number gets all the money while the other participants get nothing this method ensures that there is no advantage given to any individual

option 3 random drawing

a third option is to conduct a random drawing among all participants each participants name is written down in a hat and a random number is drawn the winner receives the prize and the rest lose nothing this method ensures that everyone has an equal chance of winning and prevents anyone from getting more than their share

option 5 equal shares based on contributions
